title: TitanPRO™ 72'' Round Plastic Folding Table
features: Suitable for indoor or outdoor use.
Standard 2'' tabletop thickness easily accepts skirting
Thick 16 gauge powder coated steel legs

specifications.Free Shipping Deal Type: Free Shipping on Tables and Chairs Over $5k, Free Shipping on 10 or more

faq.question: Does this table ship assembled?
faq.answer: Yes, the TitanPRO ships fully assembled. No setup is required beyond unfolding the legs before first use. Bulk orders of 10 or more qualify for free shipping deals, and large orders can be quoted for additional wholesale pricing.

faq.question: How does the TitanPRO™ compare to tables sold at Home Depot or Costco?
faq.answer: Consumer-grade plastic folding tables are typically built with 18-gauge steel legs and thinner tabletop cores designed for occasional home use. The TitanPRO™ uses 16-gauge legs, commercial-grade HDPE, and gravity-lock safety rings engineered for the frequency and load demands of rental and venue operations. The 3-year commercial warranty reflects that difference.
